name: grc-writing
description: Write governance, risk, and compliance documents in one consistent house format and a plain professional voice. Bundles three skills: policy-writing (policies and charters), control-writing (measurable controls, with the full NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5 catalog), and process-writing (BCP, DR, IR, BIA, procedures, and runbooks). Enforces hard style rules (no em dashes, no AI slop) and pushes back on weak design instead of polishing it.
